name: PitchBook API

auth.notes: Standalone API contract; API key or authentication token; access via PitchBook Direct Data/API team.

notes: Official PitchBook help confirms a REST API base URL and Direct Data/API contract path, but detailed endpoint overview remains gated.
Third-party dltHub and Unified.to sources indicate community/partner integration and MCP coverage, but they are not a substitute for official endpoint/spec docs.
reviewReason: Official page confirms REST base URL and API key/authentication-token setup through PitchBook Direct Data, but the endpoint overview, machine-readable spec, pagination, and rate-limit docs appear gated behind PitchBook/API access. Third-party dltHub/Unified.to evidence is not enough to publish.
